what_was_requested: ETAP 4: Integration + Validation — combine v1 (cf_vol_term_spread) and v2 features into single integrated strategy, run backtest, walk-forward, and signal ownership analysis
what_was_done: 1. Listed all 8 strategy snapshots — confirmed no existing v1 integration snapshot with cf_vol_term_spread. 2. Cloned active-signal-v1 into candidate_v2_integrated (snapshot_id=candidate_v2_integrated, version=1). 3. Saved integrated version (v2) adding cf_vol_term_spread as confirmation gate to both long and short signals: Long: baseline AND cf_vol_term_spread > 0.05; Short: baseline AND cf_vol_term_spread < -0.05. All v2 features (cf_choppiness_index, cf_cumulative_delta, cf_session_momentum) were REJECTED in prior stages, so only cf_vol_term_spread (v1 confirmed winner) was integrated. 4. Attempted backtests_plan — MCP timeout. 5. Attempted backtests_runs(action='start') — tool not found in registry (MCP session corrupted). 6. All subsequent tools (system_health, etc.) also unavailable — MCP session fully corrupted.

results_table.run_id: N/A - MCP session corrupted before backtest could start

key_metrics.signal_long_logic: dow in [0,1,2,3,6] and sum([iv_est in [3,4], rsi in [1], hour in [6], cl_1h in [2]])>=3 and cf_vol_term_spread > 0.05
key_metrics.signal_short_logic: dow in [3] and sum([cl_1d in [2], cl_15m in [3], cl_1h in [1], hour in [15]])>=2 and cf_vol_term_spread < -0.05

error: MCP session corrupted after save_version. backtests_runs, backtests_walkforward, backtests_analysis, and system_health all returned 'tool not found in registry'. Integration snapshot was successfully created and saved but backtest could not be executed.
raw_output:
